speed_model.method: speedup = A(K) / (K*draft_ms + verify_ms) * target_ms; target 18.2ms (55 tok/s), draft 7.3ms (137 tok/s), verify ~18.2ms (T=K+1 prefill ~ 1 target weight-read)

with_hypothetical_0p6B_draft_~250tok_s.note: 0.6B NOT local; would make it strong

gate_verdict.acceptance: EXCELLENT (3.263 @K4, well above 2.0 bar; every prompt >=1.6)
gate_verdict.speed_bucket: B_marginal (~1.3x optimal @K2) -- acceptance is great but the 1.7B draft is too expensive (only 2.5x faster than 8B); draft cost caps speedup
gate_verdict.decision: integration-worthy but MODEST (~1.3x) with the local 1.7B draft; STRONG (~1.7x) only with a 0.6B draft (not local). Acceptance is NOT the bottleneck -- draft cost is.

draft_0p6B.gate_decision: PASS both criteria: accepted/pass 2.844 (>2) AND draft 273 tok/s (>200). 0.6B beats 1.7B net (~1.6x vs ~1.3x) -- smaller draft trades a little acceptance for 2x speed. INTEGRATE.
